hero.eyebrow: AVAILABLE FOR FREELANCE AND PRODUCT WORK
hero.title: I design and build digital products that look premium and work like a real business tool.
hero.lead: Full-stack developer focused on interfaces that attract trust, backend systems that scale, and product flows that help clients act fast.
hero.metaLocation: Based in Kazakhstan, working remotely worldwide
hero.metaAvailability: React, Django, API, automation, product UX

featured.title: Projects shaped around clarity, structure and conversion
featured.lead: I focus on product decisions that help the user understand the offer faster and help the business move cleaner.

services.title: The kind of work I am strongest at
services.lead: I combine execution speed with enough product judgment to avoid building impressive but ineffective interfaces.

about.title: I care about how the product feels, not only how the code looks.
about.body: I build web products end to end: structure, interface, backend, APIs and integrations. My focus is always practical - ship something that looks sharp, communicates confidence and solves the task without unnecessary complexity.

contact.title: Need a developer who can think in product terms, not just write code?
contact.lead: If you need a portfolio site, service platform, admin dashboard, API backend or a custom web tool, I can take it from concept to polished delivery.

projectsPage.title: A closer look at the products, systems and flows I build.
projectsPage.lead: Each case is approached as a product problem first: define the structure, improve the experience, then support it with a stable technical implementation.
projectsPage.ctaTitle: If you want a sharper, more convincing digital product, I can build it with you.
projectsPage.ctaLead: I work best on products where UX, structure and backend execution matter at the same time.
